title: 남자는 작동 원리만 알면 간단합니다
text: talked a lot about various aspects of male psychology so far. Perhaps those were merely secondary matters. If I could give women just one piece of advice regarding men, I would say this without hesitation. It is the core, the essence, and the most important fact: men do not want to be loved. Then what do they want? Men want recognition. I have spoken about the six aspects of male recognition before. Despite this, it seemed there were still many women who did not understand this simple yet powerful core. Today, I want to convey this clearly. For those who understand this, men are not difficult. Often, without even realizing that they have mastered the core, they naturally come to enjoy a man's steadfast loyalty and love. Women who do not know this try to return the love they want to receive to men in a way that would make them happy. That is not to say it is bad, but the results will not be satisfying compared to the effort. Living as a man for over 30 years, this is what I have learned about men. When do I feel truly satisfied with life, and when do I feel a vast gap that cannot be exchanged for money? It is not the moments when I am loved and cared for. Also, saying this does not mean you should treat men harshly or that there is no need to maintain the respect that should be upheld as human being to human being. You probably don't think about it, but that is n't the point. Men feel true happiness when they confirm that they are useful. They feel that their lives are worth living. When men feel that they are clearly helping friends, colleagues, family, and lovers, they strive to maintain that position and grow. Do you know why men in their 50s are prone to developing bad tempers? It is because they feel they are gradually losing their usefulness as a head of the household and as a member of society. For a man, sincere recognition from the people he loves is an invaluable trophy. When acknowledged and praised, he wants to do better and pledges even greater loyalty. But why do they stake their lives on recognition like this? I don't know either. I was just born this way. Because it cannot be explained as an innate trait, the power of this tendency is likely even stronger. For reference, I am far from

title: 남자는 작동 원리만 알면 간단합니다
text: . But why do they stake their lives on recognition like this? I don't know either. I was just born this way. Because it cannot be explained as an innate trait, the power of this tendency is likely even stronger. For reference, I am far from being a "real man" or a macho type. I often hear comments like, "Why is a man from Busan so gentle?" Yet, even someone like me cannot shake off this fundamental male desire. So, let's talk about it now. How should you treat men? I don't mean you should just praise them all the time when they are worth less than 10 cents. I keep emphasizing this: you need to know what is truly important. The answer lies in women who handle men well. These women understand men's characteristics and... You can control the pace. First of all, you should meet a decent, normal man. In today's discussion, what kind of man is the "abnormal" one? 4. He is a man who wants to be loved by women. Interpretations of terms may vary from person to person, but I will explain it practically. A man who sulks because he doesn't like a gift he received; a man who habitually and naturally asks you to bring him an umbrella because it is raining; a man who bluntly says the food tastes bad after you cooked for him; a man for whom complaining about being treated better is a daily routine. Do you get the gist?

title: 남자는 작동 원리만 알면 간단합니다
text: ually and naturally asks you to bring him an umbrella because it is raining; a man who bluntly says the food tastes bad after you cooked for him; a man for whom complaining about being treated better is a daily routine. Do you get the gist? There are men who show a desire to be loved in the same way that women receive. Everyone, you do not need to meet such a man. If your hobby is being devoted only to be discarded like a shoe, then meet him. Or if you are okay with being tormented because the position is too good, then meet him. Unless it is one of those things, there is no need to meet him. The world is full of men who would be happy just by being praised with words like, "Thank you so much, you are the best." Just because someone comes riding a horse doesn't mean they are all the same man. If you meet a prince, you will become a high-ranking woman. If you want to be a princess, you must find a knight. Then, what do smart princesses do? They recognize a man's abilities and give him a suitable partner. Once the partner is achieved, they do not spare white, pure praise. Others... You want to do better. As you do so, you actually start to get better little by little. That is how a man grows, and he devotes his loyalty to the woman who recognized him. You will likely savor the love of that decent man. What about the bad cases? First, without even checking the man's capabilities, she starts by making demands of her own. She recklessly makes unreasonable requests and tasks he cannot handle. It is likely because she wants to be showered with love immediately. She loses confidence when she realizes she cannot satisfy the woman. In the meantime, the woman expresses her dissatisfaction. In reality, from her perspective, it is likely pent-up frustration like, "Do better," but the focus is completely off. The man leaves the woman. It is not because he did not receive love; it is because he confirmed that he is useless to this woman. You might ask why a man who approached you first would turn away of his own accord? With a very high probability, this is the case. He wanted to be the man who suits you, the knight who protects you. However, his standards are too high. A man seeks a woman he can fill and a castle of a size he can protect well. Because that is the only way he can survive. If you show patience, acknowledge him, and praise him, eventually the man will pledge his loyalty and resolve to give you everything. She ends up doing this. She only talks about her complaints and regrets, while her emotional deficiency leads her to cultivate affection and attention beyond the capabilities of the man she is examining—a woman whose soul cannot accept such loyalty. To what extent? That man might even get hit by a car in her place. I am not exaggerating; it is to that extent. It is like cutting open the belly of a goose that lays a golden egg every day, unable to leave it alone. It is a foolish approach. I speak based on the standards of a "decent man" for the sake of the owner. Others do not want to be loved; they want to be acknowledged. A man devotes his loyalty to someone who recognizes his true worth. That is not largely for the sake of the other person; it is because he is happy. The fact that I am a man my woman needs is important. If you make her feel that, then being a man won't be that difficult from then on. I hope this gives you something to think about. Subscribing, liking, and setting notifications are a great help to the market. I will stop here for today. Thank you. No 222 Ugh [Music] Ugh
